# UC-19.3.8 · Proxmox pveproxy and API Authentication Failure Spike

## Description

The Proxmox web UI and API share `pveproxy`. Bursts of HTTP 401/403 from a single address may indicate password spraying, stolen API tokens, or misconfigured automation. Baseline legitimate monitoring accounts to reduce noise.

## Value

Detects credential attacks and broken integrations against the virtualization control plane before hosts are reconfigured or guests migrated maliciously.

## Implementation

Enable structured access logging. Extract `client_ip` using `access_combined` or custom transforms. Whitelist known automation subnets via lookup. Correlate with successful POSTs to `/api2/json/nodes` for possible follow-on activity.

## SPL

```spl
index=virtualization sourcetype="proxmox:pveproxy" earliest=-1h
| search status=401 OR status=403 OR "authentication failure"
| stats count as failures by client_ip, user
| where failures>=20
| sort -failures
```

## Visualization

Map (source IPs), Table (top offenders), Timechart (401 rate).
